title: Handling of genomics samples
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"813fo","text":"This protocol describes the handling of genomics samples for the Tara Oceans expedition and is part of Viral to metazoan marine plankton nucleotide sequences from the Tara Oceans expedition. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":65,"length":4},{"style":"italic","offset":167,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":103,"length":86}],"data":[]},{"key":"9i80o","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b52vu","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ark5c","text":"","type":"align-center","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dai0v","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"5qroa","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d6j28","text":"Figure 1: Overview of -omics analysis strategy applied on Tara Oceans samples.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7oei2","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CBBE2106A7B342A8AD948AE4B30A26AB","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/viral-to-metazoan-marine-plankton-nucleotide-seque-qv6dw9e"}},"1":{"type":"imageblock","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"ECF2F3AD30C14B2B9D61E02A602CDEC9","height":"595","is_video":false,"mime":null,"original_name":"Figure 1.jpg","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/zhnfw26.jpg","source":"https://content.protocols.io/zhnfw26.jpg","width":"573"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4460v","text":"Genomics samples were transferred on average every 6 weeks from a port of call to the European Molecular Biology Laboratory (EMBL, Heidelberg) in Germany. Transportation was organized by experts from World Courier (www.worldcourier.com) who ensured that the chain of cold was never broken. At EMBL, samples were sorted, repackaged according to their final destination, and transported again by World Courier to the different laboratories responsible for their analysis (Table 1).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":215,"length":20}],"data":[]},{"key":"alvu","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"57jha","text":"Table 1: Summary of libraries generated from Tara Oceans DNA and RNA samples and sequencing experiments performed on each type of library.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b2t6v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2cfrp","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"3quil","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dvgvv","text":"*Number of libraries with available readsets in public databases at the date of publication of the paper","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e2elo","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bksbd","text":"In the respective laboratories, samples were immediately identified by scanning/reading their barcode label and were stored in cryo boxes or in −80 °C freezers. During all these steps, samples were manipulated on dry ice. Each laboratory used its own sample management system to record the storage location and to monitor sample usage.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d514e","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2u99m","text":" ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"22ct7","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"381E9F581EAF45DF9D1001CEF6341578","url":"http://www.worldcourier.com/"}},"1":{"type":"imageblock","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"11A0B46CED30443BB71803E04046711D","height":null,"is_video":false,"mime":null,"original_name":"Screen Shot 2018-06-11 at 11.14.20 PM.png","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/zhsfw26.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/zhsfw26.png","width":null}}}}
creator: Adriana Alberti
